issues.title: missing-zero-check
issues.description:
Escrow.constructor(address,address)._arbiter (contract.sol#12) lacks a zero-check on :
		- arbiter = _arbiter (contract.sol#16)
issues.recommendation: Review and apply security best practices

issues.recommendation: Review and apply security best practices

issues.title: solc-version
issues.description:
Version constraint ^0.8.20 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- VerbatimInvalidDeduplication
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.20 (contract.sol#2)

issues.title: reentrancy-unlimited-gas
issues.description:
Reentrancy in Escrow.releaseFunds() (contract.sol#45-50):
	External calls:
	- address(payee).transfer(amount) (contract.sol#47)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- resetContract() (contract.sol#48)
		- amount = 0 (contract.sol#55)
	- resetContract() (contract.sol#48)
		- payeeApproval = false (contract.sol#54)
	- resetContract() (contract.sol#48)
		- payerApproval = false (contract.sol#53)
issues.recommendation: Review and apply security best practices

issues.title: reentrancy-unlimited-gas
issues.description:
Reentrancy in Escrow.refund() (contract.sol#58-62):
	External calls:
	- address(payer).transfer(amount) (contract.sol#60)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- resetContract() (contract.sol#61)
		- amount = 0 (contract.sol#55)
	- resetContract() (contract.sol#61)
		- payeeApproval = false (contract.sol#54)
	- resetContract() (contract.sol#61)
		- payerApproval = false (contract.sol#53)
issues.recommendation: Review and apply security best practices
